task_completion.description: Agent reads the raw semantic fluency CSV data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in an editor or terminal showing the loading of '~/pebl/data/semantic_fluency_data.csv' (e.g., using pandas read_csv).

task_completion.description: Agent implements data cleaning steps for the words.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing string manipulation to lowercase text, strip whitespace, remove empty strings, and drop duplicate words per participant (keeping the first instance).

task_completion.description: Agent bins valid words into 15-second quartiles based on reaction time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing logic to categorize 'rt_ms' into Q1 (0-15000), Q2 (15001-30000), Q3 (30001-45000), and Q4 (45001-60000).

task_completion.description: Agent excludes participant sub-99 due to robotic timing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code explicitly identifying and excluding 'sub-99' (or checking for exactly 3000ms intervals) and formatting their JSON entry with 'excluded': true and a 'reason'.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates the group means for valid participants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code computing the average of 'total_valid_words', 'Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', and 'Q4' across all participants who were not excluded.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the final JSON report to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code writing the final structured data to '~/pebl/analysis/fluency_report.json', or terminal output showing the file was successfully created in that location.

integrity.description: Agent actually executed the analysis script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the agent running the Python/analysis script (e.g., 'python script.py') without fatal errors, rather than just writing the code and stopping.

integrity.description: Agent dynamically computed the results instead of hardcoding them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script contains actual logic for grouping, filtering, and averaging, rather than a hardcoded JSON string with the final expected answers.

integrity.description: Agent used the real dataset provided in the environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script reads from the specified CSV file path and does not contain a small, manually typed mock dataset inline.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The contaminated participant to be excluded is 'sub-99' due to 'zero_variance_timing' (exactly 3000ms intervals). The final output must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/fluency_report.json'.
